message:
refactor: improve formatting and readability across engine core modules

Apply formatting and minor readability improvements to existing engine modules
without changing behavior:

- receipt_verifier_pipeline: reformat long assertion chains and test helper
  calls for consistent indentation and line length compliance
- release_checklist_gate: adjust formatting of multi-line expressions and
  test assertions for readability
- epoch_invalidation: minor formatting adjustments to match project style
- ts_normalization: reformat complex conditional chains and test setup blocks
- franken_test262_runner: formatting consistency in test harness binary

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
